lines.speaker: Elder
lines.text: Ah, another soul drawn to these depths.

lines.speaker: Elder
lines.text: The caves below hold many secrets. And dangers.

lines.speaker: Elder
lines.text: The Mossy Grotto to the west holds a relic of speed. The Crystal Caves to the east are full of flying pests.

lines.speaker: Elder
lines.text: Rest at the bench when you need to. It will remember your journey.
